text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
I was sent a celestial globe... You are the sender.
This is "Why"?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that was a present from me! Uni... Happy
birthday!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Well... you often speak to the stars, don't you? So
I thought, you must like space!

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative... Yes. When doing Exchange, "Fun" is
created.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
So you do! That's such a poetic way to enjoy
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
So, well... I tried emulating you, but I feel like
how you do it is quite different...

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
During Exchange, one must adjust for Parallax. It
is "Difficulty," yes?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes, it's very difficult! That's why I'd like to try
looking at the globe together, if that's all right
with you...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'd love to be able to see the world as you
experience it! ...That's why I decided on a
celestial globe.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Neo Universe reporting desire to
Observation with Zenno Rob Roy.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
If we can Share at least somewhat... I will become
"Happiness."
